---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

Hi! I'm Yahya Eren Kaya. Welcome to my digital workspace! 🚀

**The Professional Side 💼**

-   🎓 4th-year Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University.

-   💻 Software Process Management Intern at Ibtech.

-   🎯 Future Goal: Optimizing systems in the Energy and Finance sectors.

**The Fun Side 🎮**

-   🦁 Passionate Galatasaray supporter.

-   🏎️ Huge Formula 1 enthusiast.

-   🏙️ Building massive empires in ANNO 1800.

-   🔫 Casually killing people in CS2 (virtually, of course!).

-   📉 Currently fighting with R codes for this EMU430 lab!
